name: Baked Catfish Fillets with Horseradish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange fish on a baking pan sprayed with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Sprinkle with lemon juice.
3. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
4. Fold in sour cream, onion, garlic, mustard, and 1/8 teaspoon white pepper.
5. Spoon some of the mixture on top of each fillet.
6. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes or until fish is opaque and a skewer glides easily through the flesh.
7. Meanwhile, melt butter in a small saucepan.
8. Blend in flour until smooth.
9. Stir in milk, horseradish, and remaining 1/8 teaspoon white pepper.
10. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture is bubbly and slightly thickened.
11. Serve over fish.
